title: Fruit Flavoured Gummy Sweet XXL Burger 50g – Fun & Chewy Candy Treat- Trol (24)
features: Fruit Flavoured Gummy Sweet XXL Burger 50g – Fun & Chewy Candy Treat
A deliciously fun and chewy candy treat designed to look like a real burger!
Bursting with fruity flavours, this soft and juicy gummy is perfect for satisfying your sweet cravings
Ideal for sharing, gifting, or enjoying as a playful snack
